lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Hey it's the hero! Thank you so much for saving us from Gadderanks. And the town is looking lovely as well. You've done a great job!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're more than welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: I'm Aurel the village store owner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you open the shop for me please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you like your town?

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: It's just perfect, thanks so much for your efforts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's happening around here?

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Oh, not much really, we're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place, hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey to the temple on the Salve.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help out?

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Not as far as I know, we have some basic amenities now which is so very useful, we're all incredibly grateful to you. I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: If the player has lost the Gadderhammer

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Hey it's the hero! Thank you so much for saving us from Gadderanks. And the town is looking lovely as well. You've done a great job!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're more than welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost Gadderanks' Warhammer.

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Hmm, how careless of you! However, you're in luck! Someone found it earlier and sold it to me.

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Now I can pass the hammer back to you for the remarkably cheap price of 3000 gold coins. Deal?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I don't have 3000 coins on me?

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: So that means you can't have it then! Come back when you have 3000 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oayk, I'll pay 3000 coins for the hammer.

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: A good deal and I'm sure of it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'll leave it, 3000 coins is too much to pay.

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: Very good then! I'll have no guilty conscience in offering it to other adventurers that frequent my shop then. Many thanks for your time and good day to ya sir.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why does the hammer cost so much?

lines.speaker: Aurel
lines.text: So much! That's cheap! The adventurer I bought it from wanted twice as much but I managed to knock him down to a reasonable price.
